title: [CI:DOCS] Migrate podman container image
body:
Moved to: https://github.com/containers/image_build

This is needed to consolidate both the content and the automation into one location.  Having both in the same place is intended to both protect push secrets and allow for PR-level CI testing.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
This is ready to go, new [build automation is functional and pushing images from `containers/image_build`](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5993980085665792).
@mheon @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL, can we merge this please?
